page: Microsoft Azure M64s_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external storage volumes.

Given the allocation of 1024.0 GB of RAM alongside 64 dedicated vCPUs, this server is engineered for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local temporary disks. The absence of local storage means all data persistence relies on external Premium Storage, which offers a clear tradeoff by centralizing storage management at the expense of local scratch space. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high resource density of the MSMediumMemoryv2 family makes it suitable for large-scale enterprise applications, in-memory databases, heavy relational database management systems, and large-scale data analytics where massive datasets must reside entirely in system memory.
description: The Microsoft Azure M64s_v2 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 16.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, relying on external network-attached storage for data persistence. Designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, the M64s_v2 is optimized for hosting large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy relational database management systems. Its high memory density allows massive datasets to be processed entirely in RAM, making it a robust choice for data-intensive applications that require substantial memory capacity without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M64s_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M64s_v2 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and one terabyte of RAM for large-scale enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 1024.0 GB of system memory with 16.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external volumes
Zero local storage and zero integrated GPUs
Optimized for in-memory databases and large enterprise workloads
